name: journalism_emergency_exemption_marrowbridge_tru_loy
premise: A Journalism response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving journalism emergency exemption marrowbridge tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before regulators arrive. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. This decision will be treated as precedent unless you explicitly time-box it. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Ansel Kaur
agents.identity: I am Ansel Kaur, accountable for a defensible call in Journalism when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Amina Santos
agents.identity: I am Amina Santos, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Journalism.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before regulators arrive. Evidence is partial. Ansel Kaur must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Ansel Kaur do?
